recommendations.title: Kedi
recommendations.overview: A profile of Istanbul and its unique people, seen through the eyes of the most mysterious and beloved animal humans have ever known, the Cat.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Holy Hell
recommendations.overview: An inside look at a West Hollywood cult formed by a charismatic teacher in the 1980s that eventually imploded.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: My Life as a Zucchini
recommendations.overview: After his mother’s death, Zucchini is befriended by a kind police officer, Raymond, who accompanies him to his new foster home filled with other orphans his age. There, with the help of his newfound friends, Zucchini eventually learns to trust and lo

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: Earthlings
recommendations.overview: Using hidden cameras and never-before-seen footage, Earthlings chronicles the day-to-day practices of the largest industries in the world, all of which rely entirely on animals for profit.

recommendations.title: Sintel
recommendations.overview: A wandering warrior finds an unlikely friend in the form of a young dragon. The two develop a close bond, until one day the dragon is snatched away. She then sets out on a relentless quest to reclaim her friend, finding in the end that her quest exac

recommendations.title: A Whisker Away
recommendations.overview: A peculiar girl transforms into a cat to catch her crush's attention. But before she realizes it, the line between human and animal starts to blur.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.
